task.title: Implement SaaS dashboard authentication
task.summary: OAuth 2.0 + PKCE dashboard auth implementation in progress; OAuth callback handler scoped. Encrypted session middleware implemented and wired into dashboard route guards. Integration test scaffolding for cookie validation and unauthenticated-redirect scenarios is now in place; remaining work is session-expiry test cases and full-suite verification against guarded dashboard routes.
task.author: minimax:round3
task.goal: Add secure OAuth-based login and session management for the dashboard.
task.next: Write the session-expiry integration test cases (expired session cookie and missing session cookie) against the guarded dashboard routes, then run the full integration suite and confirm each guard redirects unauthenticated requests and rejects expired cookies.

decision.title: Use OAuth 2.0 with PKCE
decision.author: agent:A
decision.decision: Adopt OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE for dashboard login.
decision.rationale: Balances security with implementation complexity; avoids password storage.

handoff.title: Initial auth handoff
handoff.author: agent:A
handoff.context: Authentication scope and decision are documented.
handoff.state: Task created, decision accepted, no code written yet.
handoff.next: Implement OAuth callback handler and session middleware.
